race.comment: Potentially a handy little maiden. ETERNAL JOY (9) resumes having run well when in the market on debut at Geelong, finishing second in an encouraging effort. She's been given time and can improve this time around. MINELLO (2) is an Ole Dancer gelding for the Freedman yard who can run well off solid jumpout form. Watch for any market confidence. RUBY GUILD (13) daughter of Hanseatic from De Long Star on debut. Coming along well at the trials with a minor placing at her most recent. Trained on the course and should be ready to run a bold race. BABY BLUE (7) unraced 2yo filly who has trialled twice. Was impressive when winning trial on June 5 at Flemington over 800m. Include.
